title: Ram

'''Ram''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] who served in [[Bravo Squad (clone commandos)|Bravo Squad]].<ref name="Triple Zero" /> [[Cloning/Legends|Cloned]] from the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], Ram was born on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]<ref name="SWE" /> and trained to become a clone commando in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] [[Kal Skirata]].<ref name="Triple Zero" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> they served at the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], and survived the battle<ref name="Triple Zero" /> while the rest of their [[Squad/Legends|squad]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|77|Ram}}</ref>

Five [[Standard day/Legends|days]] later, Ram was redeployed to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] world [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where the six [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]]s had barricaded themselves in the barracks of [[Arca Company]]. Ram and four squads of Republic commandos took part in a stand-off before Ram's training sergeant, Kal Skirata, was able to solve the situation peacefully.<ref name="Triple Zero" /> Like their clone imprint, Ram stood 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="SWE" /> In combat, Ram used the standard [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|''Katarn''-class armor]] issued to clone commandos, but with customized [[Color/Legends|colors]].<ref name="Triple Zero" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ram appeared in the [[2006]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'', written by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="Triple Zero" />
